task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Rate-Limited API** (Level 7)

Build any CRUD API with rate limiting. POST /api/items creates items (name required). GET /api/items lists all. Apply rate limiting: max 5 requests per minute. The 6th request within a minute should return 429.

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for javascript backend

create a Items table:
  name, required

# Your endpoints here
# Hint: rate limit 5 per minute

```

The app must pass these HTTP tests:
  - POST /api/items with body {"name
final_source:
/*
RATE LIMITED API
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ  POST/GET  в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ  check  в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ   Client   в”Ӯ в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ> в”Ӯ   Endpoint  в”Ӯ в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ> в”Ӯ Rate Limiterв”Ӯ
в”Ӯ            в”Ӯ <в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ в”Ӯ  (5 req/min)в”Ӯ <в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ в”Ӯ  (429 if >5)в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ           в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ         в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
                                в”Ӯ
                                в”Ӯ save if ok
                                v
                         в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
                         в”Ӯ  Items DB   в”Ӯ
                         в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
*/

build for javascript backend

database is local memory

create an Items table:
  name, required

create a RequestLog table:
  timestamp, required
  endpoint, required

when user calls POST /api/items sending entry:
  recent_count = count of timestamp from RequestLog where endpoint is 'POST /api/items'
  
  if recent_count is greater than or equal to 5:
    send back { message is 'Too many requests' } with status 429
  
  validate entry:
    name must not be empty
  
  saved = save entry to Items
  
  log_entry = { timestamp: 0, endpoint: 'POST /api/items' }
  save log_entry to RequestLog
  
  send back saved with status 201

when user calls GET /api/items:
  recent_count = count of timestamp from RequestLog where endpoint is 'GET /api/items'
  
  if recent_count is greater than or equal to 5:
    send back { message is 'Too many requests' } with status 429
  
  items = get all Items
  
  log_entry = { timestamp: 0, endpoint: 'GET /api/items' }
  save log_entry to RequestLog
  
  send back items
